description_long: This is a modern, single-seat chaise with a wide, rectangular seat and a tall, straight backrest. The upholstery is smooth and appears to be made of leather or faux leather in a light gray color, complemented by a large, matching cushion for added comfort. Both armrests are present and feature a unique geometric black-and-white pattern on their outer panels, adding a bold visual accent. The chaise stands on four slender, angled metal legs finished in black, giving it a slightly elevated and contemporary look. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on comfort and style, making it suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or upscale public spaces. The proportions suggest it is spacious enough for relaxed seating while maintaining a compact footprint.
description: A modern, light gray chaise with geometric-patterned armrests, a tall backrest, and black angled legs. Features a large cushion and sleek, contemporary styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, tall backrest, and large cushion, with both armrests visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the geometric black-and-white pattern on the armrest and the angled leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, smooth backrest and both rear legs, with no visible patterns.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the geometric armrest pattern and angled leg.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and rectangular with a smooth, unsegmented surface. It features a single, large cushion for added comfort and has no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both armrests are present, straight, and rectangular, with a distinctive geometric black-and-white pattern on the outer panels.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, angled, and made of metal with a black finish, giving the chaise a modern and slightly elevated appearance. They are simple and lack decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The main upholstery is solid light gray and smooth, while the outer panels of the armrests feature a bold, geometric black-and-white pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is one large, loose cushion placed against the backrest, matching the main upholstery color and providing additional comfort.
